description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: When initiated in a Sky Core Spell, the StarGuard whitelists relevant
Spells, enabling their secure execution. This whitelisting allows
Spells to run independently, supporting arbitrary complexity and custom features like office hours or expiration times. StarGuard also supports dropping a whitelisted
Spell, providing a mechanism to revoke access if needed for security or error correction. This is done via the `drop()` function.
When initiated in a Sky Core Spell, the StarGuard whitelists relevant
Spells, enabling their secure execution. This whitelisting allows
Spells to run independently, supporting arbitrary complexity and custom features like office hours or expiration times. StarGuard also supports dropping a whitelisted
Spell, providing a mechanism to revoke access if needed for security or error correction. This is done via the `drop()` function.
summary: Expand StarGuard To Include All SubProxy Deployments
description: Add a new subdocument of `A.1.9.2.3.2.2.3.1.1 - StarGuard`. This document should be located directly before `A.1.9.2.3.2.2.3.1.1.1 - StarGuard Functionality` and read as follows: StarGuard Deployment *(Core)* - For each new SubProxy, the StarGuard contract should be deployed and initialized in the same Spell and added to the keeper job, StarGuardJob. Move `A.1.9.2.3.2.2.3 - Execution Of Prime Spells` and its subdocuments to be subdocuments of `A.1.9.2.3.2 - Common Items`. The documents should be located directly after `A.1.9.2.3.2.2 - Prime Spells` Replace the term `Prime Spell` with the term…

prTitle: Atomic Atlas: decompose Sky Atlas.md into one-folder-per-document tree + sync tooling
